narrative: npm led with 86% of weekly downloads. Top package: @ai-rpg-engine/modules (429 this week). Top gainer: @ai-rpg-engine/character-profile (+1171%; Δ363). Concentration: top 5 = 30.3%. Data is partial (degraded: PyPI) (48 packages used cached previous data).

narrativeLines.label: Registry Lead
narrativeLines.text: npm led with 86% of 6,130 weekly downloads followed by PyPI (14%).

narrativeLines.label: Concentration
narrativeLines.text: Top 5 packages account for 30.3% of weekly downloads. Moderate concentration in top packages.

narrativeLines.label: Data Health
narrativeLines.text: Data is partial (degraded: PyPI) (48 packages used cached previous data).

recommendations.title: High portfolio concentration
recommendations.detail: Gini coefficient 0.83 indicates downloads are heavily concentrated in a few packages. Diversify promotion efforts across the portfolio.

recommendations.title: Heavy npm dependency
recommendations.detail: 86% of downloads come from npm. Consider cross-publishing to PyPI and NuGet to reduce single-registry risk.

recommendations.title: 15 packages with repeated spikes
recommendations.detail: Multiple download spikes detected for @ai-rpg-engine/modules, @ai-rpg-engine/campaign-memory, @ai-rpg-engine/starter-zombie. Could indicate bot activity, viral posts, or dependency adoption.

actionableAdvice.title: 75 packages in critical health
actionableAdvice.detail: backpropagate, mcpt, tool-compass, polyglot-gpu, comfy-headless scored below 20/100.
actionableAdvice.action: Review these packages for broken installs, outdated dependencies, or missing documentation. Consider archiving if no longer maintained.

actionableAdvice.title: Portfolio concentration risk
actionableAdvice.detail: Gini coefficient 0.83 — downloads are concentrated in a few packages.
actionableAdvice.action: Promote underperforming packages in README badges, blog posts, and release notes of popular packages.

actionableAdvice.title: 86% of traffic from npm
actionableAdvice.detail: Single-registry dependency increases blast radius if npm has outages or policy changes.
actionableAdvice.action: Cross-publish key packages to PyPI (via wrapper) or NuGet. Add install instructions for all registries in READMEs.
